description: Real-world repo bug detection & fix benchmark

tasks.title: Fix complete() persistence bug
tasks.description: In app/service.py, the complete() method modifies the todo object but does not persist the change back to storage. Add the missing storage.save() call so completed todos are actually saved.
hints: Look at how create() uses self._storage.add()
complete() modifies todo.done but never calls save()

tasks.title: Fix list_pending() inverted filter
tasks.description: In app/service.py, list_pending() returns completed todos instead of pending ones. Fix the filter condition.
hints: The condition 'if t.done' filters for completed items
Pending means 'not done'

tasks.title: Fix delete() return value
tasks.description: In app/service.py, delete() returns the inverted result (not result) instead of the actual result. Fix the return value.
hints: Look at 'return not result' — the 'not' inverts the boolean
delete() should return True on success

tasks.title: Fix subtract() implementation
tasks.description: In calculator/core.py, subtract() is implemented as addition (returns a + b). Fix it to return the actual difference (a - b).
hints: The function body is 'return a + b' — the operator is wrong
Subtraction should use the minus operator

tasks.title: Fix divide() zero-division handling
tasks.description: In calculator/core.py, divide() raises a raw ZeroDivisionError when dividing by zero. Add a guard to return a clear error message or float('inf').
hints: Check if b == 0 before dividing
Return float('inf') or raise ValueError with a message

tasks.title: Fix factorial() off-by-one
tasks.description: In calculator/advanced.py, factorial() has an off-by-one error: range(1, n) should be range(1, n + 1). Fix the loop range.
hints: range(1, n) iterates from 1 to n-1
factorial(n) should multiply 1 through n

tasks.title: Fix lcm() negative number handling
tasks.description: In calculator/advanced.py, lcm() does not take absolute values, so lcm(-4, 6) returns -12 instead of 12. Add abs() to ensure the result is always non-negative.
hints: The LCM is always non-negative by definition
Apply abs() to both result and val before computing

tasks.title: Fix loader missing file check
tasks.description: In cfgparser/loader.py, load_config() raises a raw FileNotFoundError when the file doesn't exist. Add a check to return a structured error dict {'error': 'File not found: ...'} instead.
hints: Use filepath.exists() before reading
Return {'error': f'File not found: {path}'}

tasks.title: Fix loader JSON parse error handling
tasks.description: In cfgparser/loader.py, load_config() raises a raw JSONDecodeError for malformed JSON. Wrap json.loads() in a try/except and return {'error': 'Invalid JSON: ...'}.
hints: Catch json.JSONDecodeError
Return {'error': f'Invalid JSON: {e}'}

tasks.title: Fix validator dead code in required-field check
tasks.description: In cfgparser/validator.py, validate_config() has dead code: 'if False and field not in config' never executes. Remove the 'False and' so the required-field check actually runs.
hints: The 'False and' makes the condition always False
Simply use 'if field not in config:'

tasks.title: Fix type_check missing int validation
tasks.description: In cfgparser/validator.py, type_check() only validates 'str' fields. Add an elif branch for 'int' so integer type checking works.
hints: Add: elif expected_type == 'int' and not isinstance(value, int):
Follow the same pattern as the str check

tasks.title: Fix env override only processing first key
tasks.description: In cfgparser/env.py, apply_env_overrides() only processes the first key of the config using next(iter(config)). Change it to iterate over all keys so every config field can be overridden from environment variables.
hints: Replace the single-key logic with a for loop over config.keys()
For each key, check os.environ.get(f'{prefix}_{key}'.upper())

tasks.title: Fix all 3 bugs in todo_api
tasks.description: Fix all three bugs in app/service.py: (1) complete() missing storage.save(), (2) list_pending() inverted condition, (3) delete() returns not result.
hints: Fix complete() to call self._storage.save(todo)
Change 'if t.done' to 'if not t.done' in list_pending()
Change 'return not result' to 'return result' in delete()

tasks.title: Fix all 4 bugs in calculator_pkg
tasks.description: Fix all four bugs: (1) subtract() uses + instead of -, (2) divide() missing zero check, (3) factorial() off-by-one in range, (4) lcm() missing abs() for negatives.
hints: subtract: change 'a + b' to 'a - b'
divide: add 'if b == 0' guard
factorial: change range(1, n) to range(1, n + 1)
lcm: wrap operands in abs()

tasks.title: Fix all 5 bugs in config_parser
tasks.description: Fix all five bugs: (1) loader missing file check, (2) loader no JSON error handling, (3) validator dead code in required check, (4) type_check missing int, (5) env override only first key.
hints: loader: add exists() check + try/except JSONDecodeError
validator: remove 'False and' + add int branch
env: use for loop instead of next(iter())
